title: Create a hyperlink with a formula
excerpt: Hi how can I show a formula column as a hyperlink. Example:CONCATENATE(“Open WhatsApp”, {Phone1})

posts.author: mimi (Mimi Fishman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi how can I show a formula column as a hyperlink. Example:CONCATENATE(“Open WhatsApp”, {Phone1})

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: HI @mimi! Thanks for this question. Have you tried to use the “link” column option? This may help resolve the issue you are tryin to tackle.
